name: Rio Ranch Spicy Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
For the flour: combine all ingredients and mix well.
For the spicy butter: combine all ingredients and whisk to combine. Keep in a warm place.
For the bleu cheese ranch dressing: combine all of the ingredients and mix.
Remove wing tips from chicken wings and discard, then cut into 2 at the joint.
In a deep pot, heat approximately 2 - 3 inches of peanut oil to 350°F. In small batches, dust the chicken wings with the seasoned flour. Fry the seasoned wings in small batches for about 10 minutes or until thoroughly cooked. Transfer the wings to a mixing bowl. Add about 2 tablespoons of the spicy butter per 10 pieces of chicken and lightly toss. Serve immediately.
